notes: Window: Jun 15–29, 2026. Curated for couples — live music, Afrobeat/reggae, art galleries, vegetarian/vegan food, comedy, dancing, fun date ideas. Highlights: Comedy Bang! Bang! at Buckhead Theatre (Jun 16), Rhys Darby at Helium (Jun 18-20), Reggae on the Rooftop Juneteenth fest (Jun 20), Pride Night at Zoo Atlanta (Jun 20), Politan Row salsa/bachata socials (Jun 20-21), Vegan Soul Sunday Father's Day (Jun 21), Lyle Lovett at City Winery (Jun 24-25), plus three free/cheap art gallery shows to anchor low-cost dates. Prices are best-available from public listings and may vary at door.
